log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goliath — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goliath — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goliath — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goliath — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goliath — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: -6/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
